en: Now, see this spark in you. It's amazing.
Whatever you choose to do with it, you'll be great.
ko: 그걸로 뭘 하든, 넌 잘 해낼 거야.

en: Our family doesn't run from things. You're the best of all of us, Miles.
You're on your way. When do I know I'm Spider-Man?
ko: 내가 스파이더맨인 걸 언제 알 수 있어?

en: You won't. ♪♪ That's all it is, Miles.
A leap of faith. ♪ Like, what's up, danger? ♪
♪ Like, what's up, danger? ♪ Made them myself.
♪♪ Can't stop me now! ♪ Travel 200 miles, I'm knocking at your door ♪
♪ And I don't really care if you ain't got a ride home ♪ I said, I got you now!
